data.body: close-gate CWD docs (ticket dystopic-ashy-mara / e9d0-72c4-3e98-4db7): edited docs/repo-snapshot-gates.md, docs/llm-framework.md, CLAUDE.md, rebar-implement+rebar-debug SKILL.md (committed) and CLAUDE.local.md (local) to (A) document that the close gate verifies HEAD of the invoking checkout and (B) instruct agents to cd into their worktree. Plan-review PASSED+signed after adding an operator-attested AC for CLAUDE.local.md. Claimed, committed f335267cc, pushed to Gerrit change 620, set Autosubmit=1. make lint green; 40 targeted doc/skill tests pass. Waiting on Verified+LLM-Review votes before closing.
